testcase.name: backup history shows no-history state when no snapshots exist
backup:created push event does not crash the renderer
backup history renders a snapshot card when snapshots are available
successful restore does not throw an error
rollback:completed push event is received without crash
Electron App › shows OnboardingWizard on first launch (no API key)
file:read returns file content
file:read error response is returned for missing file
file:write returns null data on success
file:delete returns null data on success
file:update-section returns null data on success
file:delete-section returns null data on success
file:add-section returns null data on success
file:add-item returns null data on success
file:update-item returns null data on success
file:delete-item returns null data on success
file:reorder-item returns null data on success
file:read with path traversal returns an error
mcp:list-marketplace returns module list
mcp:list-marketplace returns empty array when no modules available
mcp:validate-compatibility returns compatible result
mcp:validate-compatibility returns incompatible with reason
mcp:install returns installation record on success
mcp:install without required auth key returns error
mcp:list-installed returns array of installations
mcp:list-installed returns empty array when none installed
mcp:toggle enable returns null data
mcp:toggle disable returns null data
mcp:uninstall returns null data on success
mcp:set-auth-key returns null data on success
auth:validate returns current auth state
suggestion:request returns without crash
shows the API key input and submit button
API key input is of type password
submit button is disabled when API key input is empty
submit button becomes enabled when key is typed
submitting an invalid key shows the error-message
error message cleared when user types a new key
network-error banner shown when stored key is present but invalid
network-error banner has a Retry button
retry button calls auth:validate and updates state on success
valid key submission + auth:state-changed push transitions to workspace
wizard remains visible when auth:validate returns ok:false
skill:create returns file path and content on success
skill:create with duplicate slug surfaces an error response
skill:delete returns null data on success
skill:toggle enable returns updated enabled state
skill:toggle disable returns updated disabled state
skill:validate-structure returns valid=true for well-formed skill
skill:validate-structure returns missing sections for bare file
rule:create returns file path and content
rule:delete returns null data on success
rule:toggle responds correctly
hook:toggle responds correctly
empty state message is shown when graph has no nodes
single enabled node is rendered in the graph
multiple nodes are all rendered
disabled node is rendered with reduced opacity
warning badge is shown for node with missing frontmatter
no warning badge for node with complete frontmatter
clicking a node does not crash the renderer
graph with edges between nodes renders without crash
broken edge (missing dependency) renders without crash
graph handles multiple successive graph:updated push events
suggestion sidebar is visible in the workspace
no-suggestions empty state is shown when push delivers empty array
three suggestion cards rendered after suggestion:ready push
suggestion card contains title and description
warning severity suggestion is rendered
error severity suggestion is rendered
sidebar updates correctly on successive suggestion:ready events
suggestions replaced (not appended) on new suggestion:ready push
workspace page is visible after authentication
onboarding wizard is hidden after authentication
skill graph view is rendered inside workspace
suggestion sidebar is rendered inside workspace
project:discovered push event does not crash the renderer
graph:updated push event with nodes re-renders the graph
graph:updated with empty nodes shows empty-state message
auth:state-changed push with isValid=false re-shows the wizard
config:changed push event is handled without crash
